text:
anti-discrimination clause ought to be included in the Constitution 
with a specific provision that the State shall not discriminate on the 
grounds of mental or physical disability in line with the principles 
as stated in the RPwD Act, 2016 – Disability Rights. [Paras 34, 35]
Disability Rights – International Disability Jurisprudence – 
Discussed – United Nations Convention on the Rights of 
Persons with Disabilities, 2007. [Paras 37, 38]
Disability Rights – Judicial Services – Distinguished/
accomplished lawyers and judges with disabilities – Exemplary 
achievements of, enumerated – Reasonable accommodations 
for PwD, necessity. [Para 65]
